title: Legal Agenda documents 220 Israeli ceasefire breaches Apr 17-19: 3 killed, 7 wounded incl 4 paramedics
snippet: Khaleej Times details Legal Agenda's documentation of 220 Israeli ceasefire breaches between April 17-19 in Lebanon. Casualties include 3 killed and 7 wounded, with 4 of the wounded being paramedics. This systematic documentation provides the basis for Hezbollah's justification.
tag_reason: Legal Agenda의 체계적 휴전 위반 기록(220건, 3일간)의 구체적 수치와 구급대원 피해 상세는 이전에 보도되지 않은 신규 데이터.
